featureName: Cloud Photo Libraries (Immich, Google Photos, Amazon Photos, ...)

completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created planning artifacts for feature 040: scopes.md, report.md, uservalidation.md, scenario-manifest.json, and test-plan.json. Plan contains five sequential vertical scopes: photo platform foundation; Immich connect/scan/search; lifecycle/duplicates/removal review; capture/Telegram/cross-feature routing; multi-provider capability governance and operations. Certification fields intentionally untouched.

Second-pass plan reconciliation for feature 040. Tightened planning artifacts without changing scope count or sequence: added Change Boundary blocks to Scopes 2, 3, and 4; added SST/secret fail-loud DoD lines for Immich access_token (Scope 2) and Telegram bot_token (Scope 4); added ML decisions schema-validator unit test to Scope 3 covering lifecycle, dedupe, and removal payload contracts (SCN-040-007/008/009); added capability-taxonomy canary integration test to Scope 5 proving Go registry, NATS payload, API limitation codes, and PWA banner strings share one definition (SCN-040-013). Synced test-plan.json and scenario-manifest.json with the new test rows. No scope was renamed, removed, or marked done. certification.* untouched.

Completed Scope 1 implementation: provider-neutral photo domain/store, stable-signal versus LLM decision boundary, photos SST config flow, PHOTOS NATS stream/subjects across Go/Python/JSON, ML photo contract validators and live canary, photo schema migration, read-only photo API, integration privacy/canary tests, focused photo e2e, and broad repo gates. Verified via ./smackerel.sh config generate, ./smackerel.sh config generate --env test, ./smackerel.sh check, ./smackerel.sh format --check, ./smackerel.sh lint, ./smackerel.sh build, ./smackerel.sh test unit, COMPOSE_PROGRESS=plain ./smackerel.sh test integration, COMPOSE_PROGRESS=plain ./smackerel.sh test e2e --go-run TestPhotosFoundation_E2E_SyntheticPhotoDetailFromLiveAPI, and COMPOSE_PROGRESS=plain ./smackerel.sh test e2e. certification.* untouched.

completedPhaseClaims.scope: Scope 2: Immich Connect, Scan, And Search
completedPhaseClaims.summary: Completed Scope 2 implementation: Immich provider adapter (connect/test, capability probe, scope enumeration, scanner/monitor/skip-ledger, fetch, writer surfaces incl. AddToAlbum/Tag/Favorite/Archive/Delete/Upload/RenameFaceCluster), fail-loud SST validation for photos.providers.immich credentials, /v1/photos/connectors[/test|/{id}], /v1/photos/search, /v1/photos/{id} API family, and PWA Screens 1-5 (connectors list, add wizard, connector detail, search results, photo detail) consuming the live API. Fixed pre-existing baseline failures: go vet 'assignment copies lock value' at internal/connector/photos/adapters/immich/immich.go:140 (replaced probeClient := *client with parameterized buildImmichRequest helper) and the two TestPhotosPWA_E2E_* assertions for HTML endpoint declarations. Verified via go vet ./... (exit 0), ./smackerel.sh check, ./smackerel.sh format --check, ./smackerel.sh lint, ./smackerel.sh test unit (Go all ok, Python 402 passed), COMPOSE_PROGRESS=plain ./smackerel.sh test integration (TestPhotosImmich_ConnectScopeAndScanLiveProvider, TestPhotosImmich_IncrementalChangesUpdateState, TestPhotosImmich_SkipLedgerVisibleAndRetryable PASS), and COMPOSE_PROGRESS=plain ./smackerel.sh test e2e (35/35 shell + Go e2e packages ok including 5 TestPhotos*_E2E_* tests). certification.* untouched.

completedPhaseClaims.scope: Scope 3: Lifecycle, Duplicates, And Removal Review
completedPhaseClaims.summary: Completed Scope 3 implementation: RAW-to-processed lifecycle analyzer (editor signature, confidence, rationale, review_state), duplicate analyzer for exact/burst/HDR/panorama/near-duplicate/cross-provider clusters with best-pick rationale, removal-candidate analyzer enforcing reason+confidence+rationale+method with reversible decision states, PhotoActionToken mint/confirm with scope-hash drift checks and text-confirmation for delete, ConfirmedWriter guard wrapping every ProviderWriter so archive/delete/album-removal cannot fire before confirmation, /v1/photos/health/* and /v1/photos/actions/* endpoints, PWA Photo Health Lifecycle/Duplicates/Removal/Quality and Confirm Destructive Action screens with data-action-status attributes, and database migration 029_photo_scope3_lifecycle_dedupe_removal.sql adding photo_raw_export_links plus extending photo_clusters/photo_removal_candidates/photo_action_tokens. Verified via ./smackerel.sh check, ./smackerel.sh format --check (49 files), ./smackerel.sh lint, ./smackerel.sh test unit (Go all ok, Python 407 passed), COMPOSE_PROGRESS=plain ./smackerel.sh test integration (TestPhotosLifecycle_RAWExportsLinkedWithRationale, TestPhotosDedupe_BurstHDRPanoramaAndExactClusters all 4 subtests, TestPhotosRemovalCandidates_RequireRationaleAndNoMutationBeforeConfirm PASS), and COMPOSE_PROGRESS=plain ./smackerel.sh test e2e (Go e2e packages ok plus 35/35 shell tests, including TestPhotosDedupe_E2E_CrossProviderDuplicateReturnedOnce, TestPhotosPWA_E2E_HealthDashboardsRenderLifecycleAndDuplicates, TestPhotosRemoval_E2E_ActionPlanDoesNotMutateBeforeConfirm). certification.* untouched.

completedPhaseClaims.scope: Scope 4: Capture, Telegram, And Cross-Feature Routing
completedPhaseClaims.summary: Completed Scope 4 implementation: unified POST /v1/photos/upload multipart pipeline shared by Telegram (internal/telegram/photo_upload.go), mobile PWA (web/pwa/photo-docscan.{html,js}), and web channels with source_channel + source_ref preserved end-to-end; cross-feature routing engine (internal/connector/photos/routing.go) enforcing classification + confidence threshold + sensitivity policy across the 8 RouteTarget values (expense, recipe, document, knowledge, annotation, list, mealplan, intelligence) backed by photo_routing_decisions UNIQUE(photo_id, target) UPSERT; multi-page document scan grouping via photo_document_groups + document_group_id/document_page_index; server-side sensitive-preview gate at /v1/photos/{id}/preview returning 403 sensitivity_requires_reveal without a token; single-use, actor-bound, TTL + hash-protected reveal tokens via /v1/photos/{id}/reveal (internal/connector/photos/sensitivity.go); search redaction omits preview URL and sets requires_reveal=true for sensitive results so Telegram bot.go handleFind substitutes a reveal-required notice. Schema delivered by internal/db/migrations/031_photo_scope4_capture_routing_sensitivity.sql. Verified via ./smackerel.sh check (Config in sync with SST, scenarios registered: 4, rejected: 0), ./smackerel.sh format --check (49 files already formatted), ./smackerel.sh lint (All checks passed! + Web validation passed), ./smackerel.sh test unit (407 Python passed + Go ok including TestPhotoRoutingTargetsRequireClassificationAndConfidence 7 sub-tests + TestPhotosUpload_PreservesSourceAndProviderRefs), COMPOSE_PROGRESS=plain ./smackerel.sh test integration (TestPhotosUpload_TelegramMobileWebEnterSamePipeline, TestPhotosDocumentScan_MultiPageOCRAndCleanArtifact, TestPhotosSensitivity_ServerSidePreviewRevealAndAudit all PASS in tests/integration; no regressions in agent or drive packages), and COMPOSE_PROGRESS=plain ./smackerel.sh test e2e (107 PASS / 0 FAIL across all e2e packages including TestPhotosTelegram_E2E_UploadClassifySearchAndRetrieve with telegram/mobile/web sub-tests, TestPhotosRouting_E2E_ReceiptRecipeDocumentCreateDownstreamArtifacts, TestPhotosSensitivity_E2E_TelegramDoesNotAutoSendSensitivePhoto). certification.* untouched.

completedPhaseClaims.scope: Scope 5: Multi-Provider Capability Governance And Operations
completedPhaseClaims.summary: Completed Scope 5 implementation: PhotoPrism adapter (internal/connector/photos/adapters/photoprism/photoprism.go ~520 lines) implementing the same photolib.PhotoLibrary contract as Immich; canonical capability taxonomy SST in internal/connector/photos/capability_taxonomy.go (8 LimitationCode constants, AllLimitationDescriptors, LimitationDescriptorFor, CheckCapability, LimitationBannerStrings); provider-neutral cross-provider duplicate signal in internal/connector/photos/cross_provider.go using strict-hash equality with weak bytes+captured_at fallback; cross-provider artifact dedupe fix in internal/connector/photos/store.go (lookup-then-reuse artifacts.id by content_hash so a second provider's photo row reuses the canonical artifact); /v1/photos/connectors/capabilities/{capability}/exercise + /v1/photos/health endpoints in internal/api/photos_capability.go translating *photoprism.ProviderLimitationError into a 409 PROVIDER_LIMITATION envelope and emitting the photos_capabilities_limited_total metric; crossProviderRerank merges photoSummary rows by content_hash and emits preview.providers; observability in internal/metrics/photos.go (7 bounded-label Prometheus collectors, no bytes payload labels); SST plumbing across config/smackerel.yaml + internal/config/photos.go + scripts/commands/config.sh + internal/config/validate_test.go; PWA Photo Health dashboard (web/pwa/photo-health.{html,js}) with 8 static data-limitation-code anchors that the canary integration test inspects; smackerel.sh stress runner now exports DATABASE_URL so the synthetic 15k-photo ingest works. Verified via ./smackerel.sh check (Config in sync with SST, scenario-lint OK), ./smackerel.sh format --check (49 files), ./smackerel.sh lint (All checks passed! + Web validation passed), ./smackerel.sh test unit (407 Python + every Go package ok including new photoprism + capabilities + cross_provider + metrics tests), COMPOSE_PROGRESS=plain ./smackerel.sh test integration (TestPhotosCapability_UnsupportedOperationIs409AndNonMutating, TestPhotosCapabilityTaxonomyCanary_GoRegistryMatchesPWALimitationCodes, TestPhotosProviderNeutrality_SecondAdapterMatchesImmichShape, TestPhotosHealth_ProgressMetricsAndCapabilityLimitsFromLiveAPI all PASS; ok tests/integration 37.157s), COMPOSE_PROGRESS=plain ./smackerel.sh test e2e (TestPhotosCapability_E2E_AlbumWriteBlockedWhileSearchWorks + TestPhotosSearch_E2E_CrossProviderUnifiedRanking PASS; ok tests/e2e 97.832s with 0 FAIL across packages), and COMPOSE_PROGRESS=plain ./smackerel.sh test stress (TestPhotosIngestStress_Synthetic15000PhotoLibrarySearchableWithinTarget PASS — ingested 15000 photos +1500 cross-provider duplicates in 26.7s, search p95=203ms < 5s budget). certification.* untouched.

Formal feature-wide regression check for spec 040 at HEAD 66094d5 (74 commits ahead of origin/main). Verified zero source-code drift between the test-phase baseline SHA db4d179 and current HEAD 66094d5 (only specs/040-cloud-photo-libraries/{report.md,state.json} changed in 66094d5 — last source/infra commit was b8ae13d for 039 BUG, which predates the test-phase run), so the test-phase 15/15 SCN-040 PASS matrix is the authoritative regression baseline. Ran timeout 600 bash .github/bubbles/scripts/regression-baseline-guard.sh specs/040-cloud-photo-libraries --verbose EXIT=0 PASSED (G044 baseline-comparison detected, G045 cross-spec inventory swept all 39 done sibling specs, G046 zero route/endpoint collisions across all specs/*/design.md). Re-ran timeout 600 bash .github/bubbles/scripts/traceability-guard.sh specs/040-cloud-photo-libraries EXIT=0 PASSED (15/15 scenarios mapped to Test Plan rows + concrete test files + report evidence + DoD, 0 unmapped, 0 warnings). Manual cross-spec deep scan: (a) zero foreign /v1/photos/* route declarations in any non-040 spec — only contextual mention in 038/report.md L2222 describing a 040-owned PWA assertion; (b) zero foreign consumers of photos.* NATS subjects (PHOTOS stream + 11 photos.classify|classified|ocr|ocred|embed|embedded|lifecycle|lifecycle.result|dedupe|dedupe.result|removal.reviewed subjects all owned by 040 code paths); (c) zero foreign DML (FROM/JOIN/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE) on any of the 15 photo_* tables across migrations 025/026/029/031; (d) telegram bot.go handleFind photo branch is purely additive — gated on strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(artType), 'photo'), non-photo find results take the unchanged knowledge/domain-card path; (e) chi router photo handlers (router.go L294-L325) all under r.Route('/v1', ...) sub-router — no shadowing of pre-existing drives/recommendations/knowledge/lists/admin/artifacts/annotations/search namespaces; (f) sibling spec 038 design coherence: 038/design.md only contextually mentions photos as a routing target type (PDF/photo blob), never declares /v1/photos/* or photos.* — 040/design.md L53 explicitly classifies 038 as the generic-file sibling and 040 as the photo-native owner; both share the connector framework (internal/connector/<feature>/ + Python ML sidecar contract files + Postgres+pgvector + chi v1 sub-router + NATS request/response pairs) without contradiction; (g) sibling-spec test execution at baseline SHA: tests/integration/agent 5.528s ok, tests/integration/drive 19.155s ok, tests/e2e/agent 6.490s ok, tests/e2e/drive 25.609s ok, tests/stress/agent 3.014s ok, tests/stress/drive 365.569s ok with TestDriveScaleStress_FiveThousandFilesMonitorReplayAndSaveBurst PASS — proves shared additions did not regress 037 (LLM agent tools) or 038 (cloud drives). Verdict: REGRESSION_FREE. No fix cycle needed. Cross-Spec Conflict Summary: 0 HTTP route collisions, 0 NATS subject collisions, 0 DB table collisions, 0 telegram dispatch collisions, 0 chi router shadowing, 0 sibling-spec design contradictions, 0 sibling-spec test breakage, 0 coverage regression, 0 source code drift since test-phase SHA. certification.certifiedCompletedPhases appended dict entry plus 'regression' string fallback; execution.completedPhaseClaims appended dict + 'regression' string fallback; executionHistory appended bubbles.regression entry. lastUpdatedAt advanced to 2026-05-06T21:15:00Z. execution.currentPhase regression -> simplify.

certifiedCompletedPhases.summary: 72 bounded API probes across 14 phases (17 common + 28 uncommon + 27 random/journey incl. parallel-3/parallel-5 bursts). 69 PASS / 3 expectation-mismatch / 0 errors. Stack stayed healthy throughout. No P0/P1/P2 regressions; 6 P3/P4 hardening observations recorded.

findings.summary: POST /v1/photos/connectors/test and POST /v1/photos/connectors with empty body return 502 BAD_GATEWAY for what is a local input-validation failure ('immich: base_url is required'). Should map to 400 INVALID_REQUEST since the request never reached an upstream.

POST /v1/photos/actions/plan with scope.photo_ids:['not-a-uuid'] returns 200 and mints a real action token (photo_count:1). UUID format validation happens later at confirm time. No data harm (confirm rejects), but the plan endpoint should validate UUID format up front.

GET /v1/photos/connectors advertises both immich AND photoprism, but POST /v1/photos/connectors[/test] rejects provider='photoprism' with 'only immich photo connectors are supported in this scope'. Either drop PhotoPrism from the list endpoint or allow the connect path to accept it.

GET /v1/photos/health/duplicates/{id} (404) and POST /v1/photos/health/duplicates/{id}/best-pick (400) leak the raw lib/pq sentinel 'no rows in result set' to the client. Scrub internal error wording before reaching the response.

GET /v1/photos/search?q=<control-chars> returns 500 photo_search_failed. Other malformed queries (mega body, negative limit, emoji) return clean 200. Validate/strip control characters at handler. Same finding family as 038 G3 — fold into one hardening pass.

POST /v1/photos/actions/plan accepts scope with 200 random UUIDs (photo_count:200) and mints token without an upper bound. Worth bounding scope size at plan time to prevent very-large-token resource amplification.

API-doc verification confirmed every documented /v1/photos/* endpoint is registered in internal/api/router.go (lines 290-326). Verified via ./smackerel.sh check (Config in sync with SST, scenario-lint OK), bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh (PASSED), timeout 600 bash .github/bubbles/scripts/traceability-guard.sh (PASSED, 15/15 scenarios mapped, 0 unmapped), timeout 600 bash .github/bubbles/scripts/regression-baseline-guard.sh --verbose (PASSED). No behavior change. nextRequiredOwner=bubbles.harden for the non-blocking observations before status=done strict promotion. certification.* status untouched.

Pre-feature-done spec-review (Gary Laser Eyes) on HEAD f0b3054. Trust classification: CURRENT (canonical) — spec.md, design.md, per-scope content of scopes.md, scenario-manifest.json (already in structured Gate G057 format), state.json, and report.md are an authoritative source of truth and accurately describe implementation. Verified all 15 scenario IDs (SCN-040-001..015) align across spec.md/scopes.md/scenario-manifest.json and that every scenario's linkedTests test file + function name exists on disk (15/15 verified for tests/integration/, tests/e2e/, tests/stress/, ml/tests/, internal/, web/pwa/tests/). Verified internal/connector/photos/ implementation matches design.md §2/§3 architecture: PhotoLibrary + ProviderWriter + CapabilityReport contracts in library.go; sensitivity model (SensitivityHidden/SensitivitySensitive/sensitivity_labels) in sensitivity.go matches design §Resolved Decisions; capability taxonomy LimitationCode + LimitationDescriptor in capability_taxonomy.go matches design §3.1/§3.2; both adapters present (immich/, photoprism/). Independent governance gates: bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh specs/040-cloud-photo-libraries exit 0 (Artifact lint PASSED, only deprecated 'scopeProgress' field warning non-blocking); timeout 600 bash .github/bubbles/scripts/traceability-guard.sh specs/040-cloud-photo-libraries exit 0 (15/15 scenarios mapped to DoD + test files + report evidence, 0 unmapped, 0 warnings). One MINOR_DRIFT finding (cosmetic, non-blocking, no behavior impact, no auto-invocation of bubbles.docs per spec-review mode rules): SR-040-F1 — scopes.md Scope Summary table (lines 47-53) shows wrong Status for 3 of 5 scopes (3, 4, 5 say 'Not Started' but per-scope **Status:** Done markers + state.json certifications all confirm Done). Recommends bubbles.plan one-shot summary-table sync before final feature-done strict promotion. Carry-forward findings explicitly verified as already-tracked: ml/app/main.py:75 SMACKEREL_AUTH_TOKEN routed to bubbles.harden (NOT spec drift); C-001..C-006 OPEN (bubbles.harden runtime hardening). Chaos C-003 photoprism-list-vs-connect contract inconsistency is a runtime hardening item, NOT spec drift — spec correctly describes Immich-first with PhotoPrism as Scope-5 cross-provider duplicate-signal adapter. Wrote spec-review.md with full audit summary, findings, per-artifact trust map, and maintenance context block. Verdict for bubbles.validate: spec is safe to use as authoritative contract for feature-done promotion; the single MINOR_DRIFT item is non-blocking. certification.* status untouched (G024 — spec-review alone does not promote feature; final bubbles.validate feature-wide certification still pending). Next required owner: bubbles.validate (final feature-wide certification with Validation/Audit/Chaos Evidence sections in report.md) plus bubbles.harden for the routed hardening backlog.

executionHistory.summary: Analyst greenfield run plus review pass: created spec.md with 9 current capability-map rows, 7 actors, 13 use cases, 32 business scenarios, 21 functional requirements, 10 improvement proposals (4 competitive edge), competitive analysis across 7 platforms, platform direction, cross-feature integration map (10 features), and 12 open questions for design. Category-defining capabilities: RAW-to-processed lifecycle tracking, editor signature detection, cross-feature photo routing, LLM-driven removal candidates, stable-signal/LLM decision boundary, provider capability visibility, and explicit confirmation for destructive cleanup. Immich-first with provider-neutral core. Foreign-owned artifacts intentionally not created.

UX pass: appended ## UI Wireframes and ## User Flows sections inline in spec.md (single-file rule honored). 15 ASCII wireframes covering connectors list, Immich Add wizard, connector detail with scan progress, photo search, photo detail, four Photo Health tabs (Lifecycle, Duplicates, Removal, Quality), People (face clusters), Save Rules, Mobile document scan, Telegram conversation patterns, Confirm Destructive Action modal, and Provider Limitation Notice. 5 mermaid user flows (Connect+Scan, Search→Detail→Routing, Lifecycle Review→Removal, Telegram in-and-out, Duplicate Cluster Resolution). Wireframes encode FR-014 visible skip states, FR-019 provider capability visibility, FR-020 destructive/low-confidence confirmation, BS-016 sensitivity gating, and BS-024/025/029/030/031 explicitly. Competitor UI Insights table added. Summary counts updated to include 15 screens and 5 flows.

Design pass (mode: from-analysis, contract-grade): created design.md with 19 sections covering Design Brief, architecture, provider abstraction with capability matrix (6 providers x 11 capabilities), Postgres+pgvector data model (photos, photo_lifecycle_links, photo_clusters/_members, photo_removal_candidates, photo_capabilities, photo_sync_state, photo_face_links, photo_action_tokens), 16 new photos.* NATS subjects on a new PHOTOS stream, sync/scan pipeline, explicit LLM-vs-heuristic boundary (FR-004A allow-list), full Go core API surface under /v1/photos/* (connectors, photos, health, action tokens), UI component-to-route mapping for all 15 wireframes, cross-feature integration contracts for 12 sibling features, sensitivity model with reveal-token TTL, security + authorization matrix (5 actor classes), SST config under connectors.photos.*, observability metrics + traces + failure modes, scenario-to-test mapping for every FR/BS across unit/integration/e2e/stress, alternatives, FR/BS/UC coverage statement, and rollout outline. 7 design-specific open questions (O-040-D-01..07) with default decisions documented. design.md authored from scratch (no prior design content); no superseded sections required. state.json: activeAgent=bubbles.design, currentPhase=bootstrap. certification.* untouched. scopes.md/report.md/uservalidation.md intentionally not created (owned by bubbles.plan).
